return(function(t,n,N,I,p,x,Q,u,O,Y,V,s,J,W,L,a,F,z,G,Z,k,C,h,U,j)s,L,U,a,C,F,k,G,Z,Y,W,j,h,z,J,u,V,O=function(t,b)local n=U(b)local N=function(N,I)return J(t,{N;I},b,n)end return N
